ground.what_this_is: This is a draft design for a 'Self-Modification Audit' panel, intended to let a human operator safely review and undo changes the system made to itself.
ground.what_you_can_do: You can see the single most recent change the system made and click the 'Revert' button to undo it immediately; older changes are currently hidden as a future feature.

howto.how_to_change: It lives in the toolbar region (canvas/app/src/regions/Toolbar.tsx); changing its behavior is a code change there, surfaced via the build-intent wire.
howto.what: The primary execution trigger on the toolbar.
howto.what_you_can_do: Click to initiate the system's active run cycle.

howto.how_to_change: It lives in the workshop region (runtime/suite.py:revert_self_change); changing the behavior requires a code update there.
howto.what: The immediate, operator-only control to undo the system's last self-change.
howto.what_you_can_do: Click to trigger an instant, no-confirm git revert that re-discovers the node registry and emits a revert event; the change is itself git-reversible.

howto.how_to_change: The strip is the toolbar region (canvas/app/src/regions/Toolbar.tsx); adding or changing a control is a code change there, surfaced via the build-intent wire.

howto.what_you_can_do: See the single most recent change the system made and click 'Revert' to undo it immediately; older changes are currently hidden as a future feature.

reasons: accuracy jury (Layer 2, SOFT — variance not error): no quorum that the dossier is grounded in the element (0 of 3 draws agreed grounded). Flagged for operator scrutiny.
